subcodes.first_line: O servant of the All-Merciful! Some time ago the written pages were dispatched, and undoubtedly they have by now reached your consideration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت رحمن چندی پیش اوراق مسطور مرسول گشت البته تا بحال ملحوظ گشته
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @obedience to and respect for government authority
